ItacAcademyItem.Name: Anfistili (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Colummn, crowned, qith medallions hanging from it, empty but for one with the image of Petrarch
ItacAcademyItem.Motto: Vacuis sex locus (or just: Est locus)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
